exports.name: Canvas
exports.signature: (width: 'int', height: 'int', fill: 'str' = ' ') -> 'None'

exports.name: Column
exports.signature: (children: 'list[Widget]', sizes: 'list[Size] | None' = None, gap: 'int' = 0, width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, min_height: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: Divider
exports.signature: (orientation: "Literal['horizontal', 'vertical']" = 'horizontal', *, char: 'str | None' = None, style: 'Style' = Style(bold=False, bright=False, foreground=None, background=None), width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, min_height: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: Key
exports.signature: (value, names=None, *, module=None, qualname=None, type=None, start=1, boundary=None)

exports.name: KeyEvent
exports.signature: (key: 'Key', character: 'str | None' = None, ctrl: 'bool' = False, alt: 'bool' = False, shift: 'bool' = False) -> None

exports.name: KeyReader
exports.signature: (*, escape_timeout: 'float' = 0.05) -> 'None'

exports.name: Label
exports.signature: (text: 'str', align: 'str' = 'left', wrap: 'bool' = False, truncate: 'bool' = True, style: 'Style' = Style(bold=False, bright=False, foreground=None, background=None), width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, min_height: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: ListView
exports.signature: (items: 'Sequence[str]', *, active_index: 'int | None' = None, scroll_offset: 'int' = 0, focused: 'bool' = False, style: 'Style' = Style(bold=False, bright=False, foreground=None, background=None), active_style: 'Style' = Style(bold=True, bright=True, foreground=None, background=None), width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, min_height: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: Modal
exports.signature: (content: 'Widget | str', *, title: 'str' = '', open: 'bool' = True, preferred_width: 'int | None' = 40, preferred_height: 'int | None' = 10, min_width: 'int' = 7, min_height: 'int' = 3, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None, style: 'Style' = Style(bold=False, bright=False, foreground=None, background=None), title_style: 'Style' = Style(bold=True, bright=True, foreground=None, background=None)) -> None

exports.name: Panel
exports.signature: (content: 'Widget | str', title: 'str' = '', focused: 'bool' = False, collapsed: 'bool' = False, border: 'bool' = True, style: 'Style' = Style(bold=False, bright=False, foreground=None, background=None), title_style: 'Style' = <factory>, focus_style: 'Style' = <factory>, width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 5, min_height: 'int' = 3, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: Rect
exports.signature: (x: 'int', y: 'int', width: 'int', height: 'int') -> None

exports.name: ResizeWatcher
exports.signature: (reader: 'Callable[[], TerminalSize]' = <function get_terminal_size at 0x...>) -> 'None'

exports.name: Row
exports.signature: (children: 'list[Widget]', sizes: 'list[Size] | None' = None, gap: 'int' = 1, stack_when_narrow: 'bool' = True, width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, min_height: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: ScrollView
exports.signature: (content: 'Widget | str', *, content_height: 'int', scroll_offset: 'int' = 0, width: 'int | None' = None, height: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, min_height: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None, max_height: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: Size
exports.signature: (fixed: 'int | None' = None, flex: 'int' = 1, min_size: 'int' = 0, max_size: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: Style
exports.signature: (bold: 'bool' = False, bright: 'bool' = False, foreground: 'str | None' = None, background: 'str | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: StatusBadge
exports.signature: (text: 'str', *, status: "Literal['neutral', 'info', 'success', 'warning', 'error']" = 'neutral', style: 'Style | None' = None, width: 'int | None' = None, min_width: 'int' = 1, max_width: 'int | None' = None) -> None

exports.name: TerminalSize
exports.signature: (width: 'int', height: 'int') -> None

exports.name: Widget
exports.signature: (*args, **kwargs)

exports.name: get_terminal_size
exports.signature: (fallback: 'tuple[int, int]' = (80, 24)) -> 'TerminalSize'

exports.name: render
exports.signature: (widget: 'Widget', width: 'int', height: 'int', *, color: 'bool' = False) -> 'str'

exports.name: render_lines
exports.signature: (widget: 'Widget', width: 'int', height: 'int', *, color: 'bool' = False) -> 'list[str]'

exports.name: render_terminal
exports.signature: (widget: 'Widget', *, color: 'bool' = False, fallback: 'tuple[int, int]' = (80, 24)) -> 'list[str]'

exports.name: strip_ansi
exports.signature: (text: 'str') -> 'str'

exports.name: supports_color
exports.signature: (*, no_color: 'bool' = False, stream: 'TextIO | None' = None, environ: 'Mapping[str, str] | None' = None, platform: 'str | None' = None) -> 'bool'

exports.name: truncate
exports.signature: (text: 'str', width: 'int') -> 'str'

exports.name: visible_width
exports.signature: (text: 'str') -> 'int'
